notes: Sprint 127 - Multi-Frontend Alignment Strategy (ADR-045). This is a DOCUMENTATION and PROCESS framework, not a code feature. Deliverables: (1) Frontend Alignment Matrix document tracking feature parity across Web/CLI/Extension (docs/01-planning/01-Requirements/Frontend-Alignment-Matrix.md - EXISTS), (2) GitHub workflow automation for framework version alignment checks (.github/workflows/framework-alignment.yml - EXISTS), (3) Framework-first check workflow (.github/workflows/framework-first-check.yml - EXISTS), (4) Updated documentation across Stage 00-03 to include multi-frontend scope. Framework upgrade: CLI 5.0.0 → 6.0.0, Extension 5.x → 6.0.0. Feature parity: CLI 39% → 71%, Extension 67% → 89%. Launch confidence: 86% → 99.9%. All documentation and automation deliverables COMPLETE.
